name: APL Search Assistant — LinkedIn Capture
description: User-initiated capture of LinkedIn people-search results, single profiles you open directly, and company pages, plus a guided click-only website-enrichment wizard (profile → company About) and allabolag.se company-data capture (org.nr / financials / switchboard phone), sent to the local APL Assistant app. Personal use; it auto-reads only the page you navigate to and keeps every navigation and send behind a click; no auto-crawling.
